text.title: rag-failure-taxonomy Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-failure-taxonomy application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the case clearly retrieval-side or generation-side?

branch.conclusion: Label retrieval-fail or stale-doc per evidence.

example.trace: root → correct chunk retrieved + answer contradicts → generation-fail
example.description: Retrieved chunk is correct but the generator paraphrased a non-fact; labelled generation-fail.
